_note: V1 PLACEHOLDER: short-form video clips from approved images of you. Takes an approved gallery image and produces a 3-5 second clip with subtle motion (blink, breathing, slight head turn, camera drift). Requires an image-to-video workflow to be installed on GAMING. The recipe is registered now so the belt knows the intent; the actual workflow lands in Phase 5.
template: subtle cinematic motion: {motion_type}, identity preserved, loopable, social media ready
negative: jarring motion, face distortion, identity change, flickering, artifacts

rubric.identity_stability: 1-5 — does the face stay recognizable across all frames?
rubric.motion_quality: 1-5 — is the motion smooth and natural?
